name: Flour Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flours, salt, and baking powder.
2. Using a pastry cutter or your fingers, blend in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Gradually add the hot water, stirring until a stiff dough forms.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest at room temperature for 30 minutes, or refrigerate for up to 12 hours.
5. Divide the dough into 12 pieces. Form each piece into a ball.
6. Place each ball on a floured surface and roll out gently until flattened into an 8-inch circle.
7. Heat a hot griddle or skillet (no oil needed).
8. Cook each tortilla for about 30 seconds on one side, then turn and cook the other side for an additional 20 seconds.
Note: The recipe can be made without shortening, as noted by some users.
